column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Wearing a hakama and smiling brightly" | TEXT="卒業しました" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a graduation diploma tube" | TEXT="ありがとうございます" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Throwing a small flower petal celebration" | TEXT="おめでとう！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Crying softly out of joy" | TEXT="胸がいっぱいです" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping tears with a beautiful handkerchief" | TEXT="泣かないって決めたのに" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hands with a friend" | TEXT="ずっと友だち" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Looking straight ahead determined" | TEXT="がんばります" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Waving with both hands" | TEXT="また会おうね！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling purely towards the future" | TEXT="いってきます"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a beautiful bouquet of flowers" | TEXT="花束プレゼント" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking touched by the flowers" | TEXT="とても綺麗" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands loudly" | TEXT="パチパチパチ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing forward gracefully" | TEXT="前へ進もう" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding enthusiastically" | TEXT="うんっ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking surprised" | TEXT="ほんとに？" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a high five playfully" | TEXT="イェイ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Showing a peace sign" | TEXT="ピース" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking a bit embarrassed" | TEXT="恥ずかしいなぁ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing at parting" | TEXT="さみしくなるね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking down sadly" | TEXT="うう…" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Patting on the shoulder reassuringly" | TEXT="大丈夫" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="絶対やれるよ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an OK sign" | TEXT="オッケー" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Doing a fighting pose gently" | TEXT="ファイト！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply" | TEXT="お世話になりました" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling apologetically" | TEXT="迷惑かけてごめんね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up gratefully" | TEXT="感謝しかないです"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Running gracefully holding hakama" | TEXT="急ごう" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking out of breath" | TEXT="間に合った！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting slightly" | TEXT="遅いよー" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing playfully" | TEXT="あははは" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Thinking carefully with finger on chin" | TEXT="これからどうしようか" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Eyes sparkling with ideas" | TEXT="わくわくする" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Looking confused" | TEXT="難しいな" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Sticking tongue out playfully" | TEXT="てへ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Covering mouth with sleeve" | TEXT="内緒"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Writing in a yearbook/message board" | TEXT="寄せ書きだよ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Giving the board to someone" | TEXT="書いてっ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Reading a message affectionately" | TEXT="一生の宝物" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a selfie" | TEXT="最後に一枚！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy from emotions" | TEXT="疲れちゃった" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning gracefully" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching nicely" | TEXT="よし！" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping happily leaning on bag" | TEXT="すやすや" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waking up smiling" | TEXT="あっ！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Standing under a blooming cherry tree" | TEXT="春だね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking back affectionately" | TEXT="忘れないでね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding onto a sleeve playfully" | TEXT="行かないで" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Letting go with a smile" | TEXT="冗談だよ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Blowing a gentle kiss" | TEXT="ちゅっ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping forehead nervously" | TEXT="どきどき" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a deep breath" | TEXT="深呼吸" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Opening the door cleanly" | TEXT="新しい扉" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye warmly until out of sight" | TEXT="バイバイ"
